name: panedora
description: A premium Pandora client with a Spotify-inspired native interface

scripts.build: npm run prepare-dist && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare-dist && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare-dist && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:linux: npm run prepare-dist && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:all: npm run prepare-dist && cd dist && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && electron-builder -mwl --config electron-builder.config.js

author: Mitchell Brovarnik <mitchellbrovarnik@example.com>
